title: RBI imposes monetary penalty on The Himachal Pradesh State Co-operative Bank Ltd., Himachal Pradesh
description: The Reserve Bank of India (RBI) has, by an order dated April 10, 2026, imposed a monetary penalty of ₹7,50,000/- (Rupees Seven Lakh Fifty Thousand only) on The Himachal Pradesh State Co-operative Bank Ltd., Himachal Pradesh (the bank) for non-compliance with certain directions issued by RBI on ‘Know Your Customer (KYC)’. This penalty has been imposed in exercise of powers conferred on RBI under the provisions of Section 47A(1)(c) read with Sections 46(4)(i) and 56 of the Bankin
